titles.title: To direct the Secretary of Veterans Affairs to update directives of the Department of Veterans Affairs regarding the management of acute sexual assault, and for other purposes.
To direct the Secretary of Veterans Affairs to update directives of the Department of Veterans Affairs regarding the management of acute sexual assault, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Veterans' Affairs.
Referred to the Subcommittee on Health.

committee.name: House Veterans' Affairs
committee.activity: Hearings By (Full Committee), Hearings By (Full Committee), Referred To

term.name: Government employee pay, benefits, personnel management
